findings.description: s5 has no title and 'なし' content, making it a spurious empty section. The source document has no section that s5 corresponds to independently. Furthermore, s5 and s6 both have nearly identical hints ('FormUrlEncoded', 'フォーマッタ設定', '使用方法'), effectively duplicating the '使用方法' h2 section representation. The source document yields 10 meaningful sections (1 intro + 2 h2 + 7 h3), but the knowledge file has 11 sections (s1–s11).
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 sections: '概要' and '使用方法' (2 total). h3 sections under them: 7. Plus document intro = 10 sections total. s5 does not correspond to any distinct source section.
